education.studyType: B.Sc. in Computer Science & B.Sc. in Mathematics

education.area: Business Administration (MBA) in Technical Management of Data Science in Business

highlights: Led backend development and core library evolution for an AML transactional platform, leveraging Python, Pandas, NumPy, Dask, AWS, and CI/CD to scale analysis from millions to billions of transactions.

Applied AI/NLP and advanced engineering practices to improve transaction screening and matching against watchlists, while taking on senior-level responsibilities through strong ownership, product knowledge, and consistent delivery.
(Note: Lynx Tech was founded from a branch of the IIC)
Designed and maintained clear, concise documentation using Mermaid diagrams, Markdown, and Confluence, ensuring accessibility and ease of understanding for both developers and stakeholders.
Continued tasks from IIC with a stronger focus on coordination and quality management, including testing, CI/CD, and DevOps.
Designed and developed APIs using OpenAPI and Python, while providing the necessary AWS infrastructure to ensure scalability and reliability.
Coordinated tasks, epics, and milestones for a team of 10 developers, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to project goals.
Designed and implemented ETL structures to handle millions of records, optimizing data flow and processing for large-scale data analysis.
Consistently received exceptional annual performance reviews, recognized for delivering high-quality results, meeting key objectives, and exceeding expectations.
Taught best practices in Python testing, focusing on tools such as unittest, pytest, nose, tox, and other relevant frameworks.
Instructed students on design patterns and anti-patterns for software quality assurance, emphasizing their application in real-world projects.
work.position: Software Quality Lecturer for Master’s Program

highlights: Lead and manage a cross-functional team of 15 engineers across backend, data, ML, DevOps, and architecture, fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration, and technical excellence.
Drive end-to-end delivery in an Agile environment, balancing roadmap execution, stakeholder alignment, and technical prioritization to ensure consistent delivery of high-impact outcomes.
Own key data and architectural decisions, with strong involvement in technical design, code quality, and the definition of engineering standards across the Core domain.

Partner closely with clients to gather requirements, align expectations, and translate business needs into scalable technical solutions, including ETLs, databases, ML models, and LLM-based applications.
Mentor, hire, and manage performance for team members while actively monitoring technical KPIs, delivery health, and platform quality across the section.
Review the majority of Core code contributions to ensure maintainability, consistency, and alignment with architectural standards, despite no longer coding directly.

keywords: AWS (EC2, Lambda, S3, Bedrock, Aurora, Athena, OpenSearch, Cloud Formation, IAM, SSM, etc.)
skills.name: Cloud

awards.summary: Awarded for five consecutive years (2016-2021) due to exceptional academic performance
awards.title: Beca de Excelencia
